source.name: AC DOM Properties.xlsx
source.status_rule: Column A value 1 = confirmed; blank = research/test

entries.name: STUCK_BOOL
entries.description: Can an object be picked up? If it can't, this is true.

entries.name: OPEN_BOOL
entries.description: determines whether a chest/door is open

entries.name: LOCKED_BOOL
entries.description: determines whether a chest/door is locked

entries.name: AI_USES_MANA_BOOL
entries.description: determines whether a creatures consumes mana on spellcast

entries.name: ALLOW_GIVE_BOOL
entries.description: npc/creature accepts items being handed to it

entries.name: ETHEREAL_BOOL
entries.description: determines whether the object allows players models to pass through it

entries.name: GRAVITY_STATUS_BOOL
entries.description: determines whether an object is affected by gravity

entries.name: LIGHTS_STATUS_BOOL
entries.description: determines whether the object emits light on to nearby objects/terrain

entries.name: SCRIPTED_COLLISION_BOOL
entries.notes: example: spells, arrows, rolling balls of death

entries.name: ATTACKABLE_BOOL
entries.description: determines whether an npc/creature is attackable

entries.name: DESTROY_ON_SELL_BOOL
entries.description: 1 = item does not appear in vendor inventory when sold

entries.name: UI_HIDDEN_BOOL
entries.description: determines whether an item can be selected, 0 = yes, 1 = no

entries.name: IGNORE_HOUSE_BARRIERS_BOOL
entries.description: 1 = character model can pass through housing barrier
entries.notes: This bool only works if Admin flag is present on ObjectDescription

entries.name: PK_WOUNDER_BOOL
entries.notes: for tracking the allowed use of portals or gems?

entries.name: PK_KILLER_BOOL
entries.description: player killer status / recently killed a pk?

entries.name: NO_CORPSE_BOOL
entries.description: only appears if set to 1, creature does not leave a corpse

entries.name: RESET_MESSAGE_PENDING_BOOL
entries.notes: waiting for message from timer to reset?

entries.name: DEFAULT_OPEN_BOOL
entries.description: doors/chests, always set to 0 if it appears

entries.name: DEFAULT_LOCKED_BOOL
entries.description: object is locked by default, doors/chests etc

entries.name: LOGOFF_IM_DEAD_BOOL
entries.notes: unused log off on death option?

entries.name: ALLOW_EDGE_SLIDE_BOOL
entries.description: 1 = character will "slide" along object if running against object at angle

entries.name: ADVOCATE_QUEST_BOOL
entries.description: player has completed the advocate quest

entries.name: GENERATOR_ENTERED_WORLD_BOOL
entries.description: generator has spawned on server start
entries.notes: probably checks generator timers to determine whether to begin cycles

entries.name: NEVER_FAIL_CASTING_BOOL
entries.description: npcs / mobs never fail to spellcast

entries.name: VENDOR_SERVICE_BOOL
entries.notes: vendor services - vendor item buffs - healers - http://acpedia.org/wiki/Healer#Healer_Services_.28Level_I_-_IV.29

entries.name: AI_IMMOBILE_BOOL
entries.description: creatures that don't move (npcs, mobs, mobs disguised as objects)

entries.name: IS_HOT_BOOL
entries.description: determines whether acid, mana pools, toxic air etc are active

entries.name: IS_AFFECTING_BOOL
entries.description: character is being affected by hotspot?

entries.name: LOGGING_CHANNEL_BOOL
entries.notes: all messages sent from player appear in Audit Channel for viewing? (admin channel)

entries.name: SPELL_COMPONENTS_REQUIRED_BOOL
entries.description: 1 =  does not require spell components to cast magic

entries.name: HOUSE_HAS_GOTTEN_PRIORITY_BOOT_POS_BOOL
entries.friendly_name: House Has Gotten Priority Boot Pos

entries.name: HOUSE_HOOKS_ENABLED_BOOL
entries.notes: Makes the hooks in your house visible or invisible. In addition, there are several items that can be used while hooked. To use these items, your hooks must be off and invisible

entries.name: HOUSE_NOTIFIED_HUD_OF_HOOK_COUNT_BOOL
entries.friendly_name: House Notified Hud Of Hook Count

entries.name: AI_ACCEPT_EVERYTHING_BOOL
entries.description: npc/creature will accept *any* items given to it, regardless of emoteTable
entries.notes: example: town criers, garbage barrels, varinia

entries.name: REQUIRES_BACKPACK_SLOT_BOOL
entries.description: anything that requires the use of a backpack slot, that's not a backpack

entries.name: DONT_TURN_OR_MOVE_WHEN_GIVING_BOOL
entries.friendly_name: Dont Turn Or Move When Giving
entries.description: don't turn or move when handing an item to player

entries.name: NPC_LOOKS_LIKE_OBJECT_BOOL
entries.description: NPC Looks Like Object (Description, no stat panel)
entries.notes: when set to 1, attribute panel doesn't show upon identification, but description does.

entries.name: APPRAISAL_HAS_ALLOWED_WIELDER_BOOL
entries.description: This item can only be wielded by <player>
entries.notes: 1 to show owner in stat panel

entries.name: CHEST_REGEN_ON_CLOSE_BOOL
entries.description: 1 = chest generates new items on close

entries.name: RETAINED_BOOL
entries.description: 1 = item cannot be sold, leather applied

entries.name: LIMBO_BOOL
entries.description: 1 = player is in limbo due to admin action

entries.name: APPRAISAL_HAS_ALLOWED_ACTIVATOR_BOOL
entries.description: This item can only be activated by <player>

entries.name: IS_DEAF_BOOL
entries.notes: character property? Admin muted so they don't hear tells?

entries.name: INVINCIBLE_BOOL
entries.description: 1 = player/object does not take any damage

entries.name: CORPSE_GENERATED_RARE_BOOL
entries.notes: rare found sound + chat alert + text on corpse

entries.name: ACTD_RECEIVED_ITEMS_BOOL
entries.notes: for the non preorder bonus, Blackmoor's Favor

entries.name: FIRST_ENTER_WORLD_DONE_BOOL
entries.description: set after first entering world to provide benefits on login only once?
entries.notes: something at character creation or related to temple reset / writ of apology messages, http://acpedia.org/wiki/Some_Changes_for_February_2012

entries.name: RECALLS_DISABLED_BOOL
entries.description: unable to cast any recall spell
entries.notes: Restrict players from use of /mp /ls /ah. Primary use was for restricting access to Training Academies. See WERROR_PORTAL_RECALLS_DISABLED
entries.reference: <- States "You must exit the Training Academy before that command will be available to you.\n"

entries.name: ACTD_PREORDER_RECEIVED_ITEMS_BOOL
entries.description: received Throne of Destiny preorder items

entries.name: IS_ALLEGIANCE_GAGGED_BOOL
entries.description: character cannot speak in allegiance chat

entries.name: CHEST_CLEARED_WHEN_CLOSED_BOOL
entries.description: 1 = all items are cleared from the chest when closed

entries.name: TREASURE_CORPSE_BOOL
entries.notes: generate a treasure pile for creatures that don't leave a corpse?

entries.name: TOP_LAYER_PRIORITY_BOOL
entries.description: property on armor for layering tools?

entries.name: ACCOUNT_15_DAYS_BOOL
entries.description: account is at least 15 days old (housing / pk olthoi island restriction)

entries.name: HAD_NO_VITAE_BOOL
entries.description: PK Olthoi drop top tier loot when they die, but not if they have vitae.

entries.name: NO_OLTHOI_TALK_BOOL
entries.description: player is olthoi, can only speak in othoi channels

entries.name: USE_TARGET_SUCCESS_ANIMATION_DID
entries.description: success animation - advocate fane, pk/npk altars

entries.name: USE_TARGET_FAILURE_ANIMATION_DID
entries.description: failure animation - advocate fane / npk altar

entries.name: USE_USER_ANIMATION_DID
entries.description: animation on character on wield of wands, on use of food

entries.name: SPELL_COMPONENT_DID
entries.description: only on spell comp objects, one for each

entries.name: PHYSICS_SCRIPT_DID
entries.description: projectile spells, some weapons, some creatures, fireworks

entries.name: LINKED_PORTAL_ONE_DID
entries.notes: creatures/npcs that summon portals (the actual summon is CastSpell_EmoteType = spellid of summon primary portal)

entries.name: UNKNOWN_GUESSEDNAME
entries.notes: 193, 238, 239 - only appears on Accursed Miner, Cursed Foreman, Lich Overseer, Pile O' Bones, and Tortured Soul

entries.name: ITEM_SKILL_LIMIT_DID
entries.description: skill id to be checked against ITEM_SKILL_LEVEL_LIMIT_INT for wield reqs

entries.name: USE_CREATE_ITEM_DID
entries.description: only the advocate fane uses this. creates wcid 3653 - The Advocate's Tomes

entries.name: DEATH_SPELL_DID
entries.notes: White Rabbit dies and uses this

entries.name: ITEM_SPECIALIZED_ONLY_DID
entries.description: skill id for speciailized skill requirement to wield

entries.name: ACCOUNT_HOUSEID_DID
entries.description: id of the house that the account owns

entries.name: RESTRICTION_EFFECT_DID
entries.notes: 3 mansions have 153, 3 villas have 152. everything else has 151

entries.name: LAST_PORTAL_DID
entries.description: portal ID of last portal entered (that is recallable for portal recall?)

entries.name: ICON_OVERLAY_SECONDARY_DID
entries.description: secondary icon overlay - only stamps use this

entries.name: PROC_SPELL_DID
entries.notes: cloaks, cast on strike weapons, alchemy phials

entries.name: HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL_FLOAT
entries.description: length of time between heartbeat emote actions

entries.name: HEARTBEAT_TIMESTAMP_FLOAT
entries.description: timestamp of last heartbeat emote action

entries.name: MANA_RATE_FLOAT
entries.description: Defines how fast mana is lost from item, set to -0.033 for 1pt/30sec

entries.name: SHADE_FLOAT
entries.description: 0.0 - 1.0 - can determine shades and trims of Palette/Clothing combos.

entries.name: WEAPON_DEFENSE_FLOAT
entries.description: Melee Defense bonus multiplier. Example: Set to 1.15 for 15%

entries.name: BUY_PRICE_FLOAT
entries.description: Vendor buy rate modifier to item value: 0.1-2

entries.name: SELL_PRICE_FLOAT
entries.description: Vendor sell rate modifier to item value: 1-50 (usually 1-2)

entries.name: LOCKPICK_MOD_FLOAT
entries.description: 1 on all lockpicks, related to LOCKPICK_MOD_INT

entries.name: GENERATOR_RADIUS_FLOAT
entries.notes: generation range when regen type set to scatter

entries.name: MINIMUM_TIME_SINCE_PK_FLOAT
entries.description: on all pk/npk altars. 3 hour timer (10800 seconds)

entries.name: LAST_PORTAL_TELEPORT_TIMESTAMP_FLOAT
entries.description: timestamp of the most recent teleport

entries.name: USE_RADIUS_FLOAT
entries.description: -0.1 - 30.  Distance you can use an object

entries.name: WEAPON_OFFENSE_FLOAT
entries.description: Attack Skill bonus multiplier. Example: Set to 1.20 for 20%

entries.name: RESIST_STAMINA_DRAIN_FLOAT
entries.notes: set to 1 on npcs/vendors, varies on creatures

entries.name: RESIST_MANA_DRAIN_FLOAT
entries.notes: set to 1 on npcs/vendors - varies on creatures

entries.name: PHYSICS_SCRIPT_INTENSITY_FLOAT
entries.notes: projectiles/creatures/objects that have a particle effect

entries.name: ITEM_MANA_UPDATE_TIMESTAMP_FLOAT
entries.description: timestamp of last mana update: filling and draining?

entries.name: SPELL_GESTURE_SPEED_MOD_FLOAT
entries.description: movement speed modifier of spell animations?

entries.name: SPELL_STANCE_SPEED_MOD_FLOAT
entries.description: movement speed modifier of moving in and out of spell combat mode?

entries.name: FOCUSED_PROBABILITY_FLOAT
entries.description: .5, .6, .7, .8 -- chance to change targets during combat when attacked?

entries.name: GENERATOR_INITIAL_DELAY_FLOAT
entries.description: generator initial delay before cycle time begins?

entries.name: AI_ACQUIRE_STAMINA_FLOAT
entries.notes: Platinum, Pyreal, Obsidian, and Elariwood Golems

entries.name: AI_ACQUIRE_MANA_FLOAT
entries.notes: Platinum, Pyreal, Obsidian, and Elariwood Golems

entries.name: AI_COUNTERACT_ENCHANTMENT_FLOAT
entries.description: always 2, probability that the object will counter buff

entries.name: AI_DISPEL_ENCHANTMENT_FLOAT
entries.description: always 1, probability that the object will dispel debuffs

entries.name: TRADE_TIMESTAMP_FLOAT
entries.description: timestamp of clicking the accept trade button

entries.name: EMOTE_PRIORITY_FLOAT
entries.description: always 1, only seen on stopgaps and controllers.

entries.name: LAST_TELEPORT_START_TIMESTAMP_FLOAT
entries.notes: Likely used as an interlock on actions serverside during teleport.

entries.name: INVENTORY_OFFSET_FLOAT
entries.description: only on house hooks, always set to 20

entries.name: MANA_STONE_DESTROY_CHANCE_FLOAT
entries.description: chance of stone destruction when using filled stone on target

entries.name: SLAYER_DAMAGE_BONUS_FLOAT
entries.description: 1.0-5.0, damage bonus for species slayer weapon

entries.name: ALLEGIANCE_INFO_SPAM_TIMESTAMP_FLOAT
entries.description: timestamp of last allegiance info request

entries.name: ALLEGIANCE_INFO_SPAM_RATE_FLOAT
entries.description: rate the server allows new alleg info requests

entries.name: FELLOWSHIP_UPDATE_TIMESTAMP_FLOAT
entries.description: timestamp of last fellowship vital update?

entries.name: LIMBO_START_TIMESTAMP_FLOAT
entries.description: timestamp of admin putting player in limbo

entries.name: WEAPON_MISSILE_DEFENSE_FLOAT
entries.description: Missile Defense bonus multiplier. Example: Set to 1.025 for 2.5%

entries.name: WEAPON_MAGIC_DEFENSE_FLOAT
entries.description: Magic Defense bonus multiplier. Example: Set to 1.025 for 2.5%

entries.name: LAST_RARE_USED_TIMESTAMP_FLOAT
entries.description: rare used timestamp, to limit rare use

entries.name: PROC_SPELL_RATE_FLOAT
entries.description: rate of proc spell on cloak/aetheria/weapons

entries.name: RESISTANCE_MODIFIER_FLOAT
entries.notes: always set to 1.0 bonus multiplier for enum 263 - RESISTANCE_MODIFIER_TYPE_INT

entries.name: GAG_DURATION_FLOAT
entries.description: length of chat gag in seconds

entries.name: GLOBAL_XP_MOD_FLOAT
entries.description: global xp modifier, how double xp weekends could be enabled?

entries.name: COOLDOWN_DURATION_FLOAT
entries.description: 5 second cooldown fizzle between casting war and void?

entries.name: WEAPON_AURA_OFFENSE_FLOAT
entries.description: weapon buffs are cast on character and apply to all weapons equipped

entries.name: WEAPON_AURA_DEFENSE_FLOAT
entries.description: weapon buffs are cast on character and apply to all weapons equipped

entries.name: WEAPON_AURA_ELEMENTAL_FLOAT
entries.description: weapon buffs are cast on character and apply to all weapons equipped

entries.name: WEAPON_AURA_MANA_CONV_FLOAT
entries.description: weapon buffs are cast on character and apply to all weapons equipped

entries.name: HEAR_TEXTBOX_SPEECH
entries.notes: only seen on "An angry spirit"'s hidden in gaerlans citadel to handle events for puzzles

entries.name: PALETTE_TEMPLATE_INT
entries.description: changes the palette template (color) of the item or creature

entries.name: ITEMS_CAPACITY_INT
entries.description: Item Capacity of a Container (Pack, Player, Monster, NPC)

entries.name: CURRENT_WIELDED_LOCATION_INT
entries.notes: used by creatures, this is set on any item being wielded with where its being wielded

entries.name: STACK_UNIT_ENCUMB_INT
entries.notes: for stackable items only, base burden per unit

entries.name: STACK_UNIT_VALUE_INT
entries.notes: for stackable items only, base value per unit

entries.name: COIN_VALUE_INT
entries.description: For Players only: Total Pyreals in inventory (not counting storage)
entries.notes: for player characters only, used to update UI (and total available py check)

entries.name: TOTAL_EXPERIENCE_INT
entries.description: Total Experience Earned, Player Character Only

entries.name: TOTAL_SKILL_CREDITS_INT
entries.description: Total Skill Credits Earned, Player Character Only

entries.name: AVAILABLE_SKILL_CREDITS_INT
entries.description: Available Skill Credits, Player Character Only
entries.notes: How many skill credits do you have unspent?

entries.name: CHANNELS_ALLOWED_INT
entries.description: Old Admin Global Channels available to character (Channel Enum)
entries.notes: Channels enum found in ACE (this one would be for channels you can subscribe to (@on)

entries.name: CHANNELS_ACTIVE_INT
entries.description: Old Admin Global Channels character is currently listening to (Channel Enum)
entries.notes: Channels enum found in ACE (this one would be for channels you are currently subscribed to (@clist?)

entries.name: RESIST_ITEM_APPRAISAL_INT
entries.description: the difficulty to ID an item (mostly creature weapons)
entries.notes: set to 9999 to make something unappraisable

entries.name: DEPRECATED_RESIST_REPAIR_INT
entries.description: for unreleased skill Arms and Armor Repair

entries.name: COMBAT_MODE_INT
entries.description: Combat Mode (Melee, Wand, Missile, Peace) Player Char Only

entries.name: NUM_DEATHS_INT
entries.description: Total Death Count, Player Character Only

entries.name: DEFAULT_COMBAT_STYLE_INT
entries.description: set to value that matches weapon type

entries.name: WEAPON_TIME_INT
entries.description: Defines the speed of the weapon

entries.name: AMMO_TYPE_INT
entries.description: Type of Ammo, set on missile weapon, and ammunition

entries.name: PARENT_LOCATION_INT
entries.description: Related to wielded location of item.

entries.name: PLACEMENT_POSITION_INT
entries.notes: value always = 3, for all missile weapons (bow, xbow, atlatl)

entries.name: WEAPON_RANGE_INT
entries.notes: definitely a missilelauncher attribute, but not directly range (which is a float (Velocity))

entries.name: TOLERANCE_INT
entries.description: Special tolerance levels for creatures deciding to attack you or not

entries.name: FRIEND_TYPE_INT
entries.description: groups of creatures that will attack you if you attack their friend

entries.name: FOE_TYPE_INT
entries.description: groups of creatures that will attack eachother

entries.name: MERCHANDISE_ITEM_TYPES_INT
entries.description: For Vendors, ItemType Enum to set what types of items vendor will buy

entries.name: MERCHANDISE_MIN_VALUE_INT
entries.description: Min value of item allowed to be bought by vendor

entries.name: MERCHANDISE_MAX_VALUE_INT
entries.description: Max value of item allowed to be bought by vendor

entries.name: MAX_GENERATED_OBJECTS_INT
entries.description: generators/chests, max number of items that can be generated at one time

entries.name: INIT_GENERATED_OBJECTS_INT
entries.description: generators/chests, number of items initially generated

entries.name: ACTIVATION_RESPONSE_INT
entries.description: used for traps, chests, and a handful of objects

entries.name: BOOSTER_ENUM_INT
entries.description: the stat food/potions boost (health, stamina, mana)

entries.name: BOOST_VALUE_INT
entries.description: value of vital boosted (health, stamina, mana)

entries.name: MAX_STRUCTURE_INT
entries.description: Max number of uses (heal kits, keys, lockpicks, keyrings, etc)

entries.name: PHYSICS_STATE_INT
entries.notes: Current Physics State of object (1032 - mob, 6292504 - unattackable NPC with green name tell text)

entries.name: TARGET_TYPE_INT
entries.notes: defines the types of objects an item can used/applied on (ex: lockpicks = 640)

entries.name: ENCUMB_CAPACITY_INT
entries.description: Max amount of ENCUMB_VAL allowed for creature (Player only)
entries.notes: unknown, seems to apply to chests and packs

entries.name: CREATION_TIMESTAMP_INT
entries.notes: World Creation Timestamp (Used for Item Decay among other things)

entries.name: PK_LEVEL_MODIFIER_INT
entries.description: value of pk modifier on altars
entries.notes: -1 - Adja's Memorial, Altar of Asheron,1 - Altar of Bael'Zharon, Eye of Darkness

entries.name: GENERATOR_TYPE_INT
entries.notes: only value is 1, various chests and creature spawn generators...

entries.name: GENERATOR_DESTRUCTION_TYPE_INT
entries.description: Action generated items will take when their generator is removed from world (deleted, killed, etc.)

entries.name: ITEM_CUR_MANA_INT
entries.description: Current mana of the item (becomes "stored mana" if greater than int 108)

entries.name: ADVOCATE_LEVEL_INT
entries.notes: Likly this was was either 0-5 or 1-6. relates to @bestow command and the color of shield you had as an advocate, 1=Orange(AiT), 2=Teal(Advocate), 3 and 4 were never used and were green and purple, 5=Red, granted teleporting powers.. and ultimately I believe 6 was the white with sparkle stars. I believe that one was only ever used by Dave Namerow

entries.name: ITEM_MANA_COST_INT
entries.description: Mana cost of activating the built in spell on a wand

entries.name: ACTIVE_INT
entries.notes: something to do with traps/interactable objects - 0, 1, 65535

entries.name: NUM_ALLEGIANCE_BREAKS_INT
entries.description: number of times broken allegiance (is this for the xp to swear mechanic?)

entries.name: AI_OPTIONS_INT
entries.notes: only value listed is 1, many creatures have this

entries.name: GENERATOR_START_TIME_INT
entries.description: unix timestamp for generator to start

entries.name: GENERATOR_END_TIME_INT
entries.description: unix timestamp for generator to stop

entries.name: GENERATOR_END_DESTRUCTION_TYPE_INT
entries.description: Action generated items will take when their generator is ended (event gens)

entries.name: XP_OVERRIDE_INT
entries.description: Experience Points awarded when a creature is killed.

entries.name: HOUSE_STATUS_INT
entries.notes: One villa and one mansion have -1

entries.name: HOOK_PLACEMENT_INT
entries.description: defined on items, placement it appears on a house hook

entries.name: HOUSE_MAX_HOOKS_USABLE_INT
entries.description: number of usable hooks in a house

entries.name: HOUSE_CURRENT_HOOKS_USABLE_INT
entries.description: available number of usable hooks left in a house?

entries.name: ALLEGIANCE_MIN_LEVEL_INT
entries.description: minimum allegiance rank to buy mansion

entries.name: NUM_TIMES_TINKERED_INT
entries.description: number of times an item was tinkered

entries.name: APPRAISAL_LOCKPICK_SUCCESS_PERCENT_INT
entries.description: display lockpick chance of success on locked doors/chests ID panel
entries.notes: Normally hidden from view of player.

entries.name: APPRAISAL_PAGES_INT
entries.description: display number of pages on ID panel

entries.name: APPRAISAL_MAX_PAGES_INT
entries.description: display max number of pages on ID panel

entries.name: GEM_COUNT_INT
entries.description: amount of gems set in an item

entries.name: GEM_TYPE_INT
entries.description: type of gem set in an item

entries.name: CHESS_RANK_INT
entries.description: chess rank in player stat panel

entries.name: TYPE_OF_ALTERATION_INT
entries.notes: 1 - Gems of Enlightenment 2 - Gems of Forgetfulness

entries.name: SKILL_TO_BE_ALTERED_INT
entries.description: Skill to be altered on spec/unspec gems

entries.name: SKILL_ALTERATION_COUNT_INT
entries.description: server side count of how many spec/unspecs used? for use with timers
entries.notes: server side count of how many spec/unspecs used? for use with timers

entries.name: ATTRIBUTE_TRANSFER_COUNT_INT
entries.description: server side count of how many transfers used? for use with timers
entries.notes: server side count of how many transfers used? for use with timers

entries.name: NUM_KEYS_INT
entries.description: Number of keys contained on a keyring

entries.name: VICTIM_TIMESTAMP_INT
entries.description: Last time killed by a pk

entries.name: HOUSE_PURCHASE_TIMESTAMP_INT
entries.description: timestamp when purchasing a new house

entries.name: AUGMENTATION_INNATE_FAMILY_INT
entries.description: number of times an attribute augmentation earned (Max 10)
entries.notes: Total base state augmentations allowed is 10 (choose from below, base max is still 100)

entries.name: AUGMENTATION_INNATE_STRENGTH_INT
entries.description: number of times earned, each one raises stat by 5

entries.name: AUGMENTATION_INNATE_ENDURANCE_INT
entries.description: number of times earned, each one raises stat by 5

entries.name: AUGMENTATION_INNATE_COORDINATION_INT
entries.description: number of times earned, each one raises stat by 5

entries.name: AUGMENTATION_INNATE_QUICKNESS_INT
entries.description: number of times earned, each one raises stat by 5

entries.name: AUGMENTATION_INNATE_FOCUS_INT
entries.description: number of times earned, each one raises stat by 5

entries.name: AUGMENTATION_INNATE_SELF_INT
entries.description: number of times earned, each one raises stat by 5

entries.name: AUGMENTATION_RESISTANCE_FAMILY_INT
entries.description: number of times a resistance augmentation earned (Choose a Max of 2 from below)
entries.notes: Total resistance augmentations allowed from below (choose only 2)

entries.name: RARES_LOGIN_TIMESTAMP_INT
entries.notes: Last time a rare dropped? first login since last rare dropped?

entries.name: RESISTANCE_MODIFIER_TYPE_INT
entries.notes: enum ResistanceEnchantment_BFIndex - Works only with float 157

entries.name: LIFESPAN_INT
entries.description: total lifespan in seconds until item is destroyed

entries.name: REMAINING_LIFESPAN_INT
entries.description: seconds remaining until item is destroyed
entries.notes: Displays time left on item ID

entries.name: UNIQUE_INT
entries.description: Amount of items that can be carried
entries.notes: Ex: Set to 1:You can only carry 1 of these items.

entries.name: SHARED_COOLDOWN_INT
entries.description: summoning essences, portal gems. shared ID's to share cooldown timers

entries.name: FACTION1_BITS_INT
entries.description: which faction you are aligned with
entries.notes: 1 - Celestial Hand 2 - Eldrytch Web 4 - Radiant Blood

entries.name: FACTION2_BITS_INT
entries.description: which faction you are aligned with

entries.name: FACTION3_BITS_INT
entries.description: which faction you are aligned with

entries.name: HATRED1_BITS_INT
entries.description: for opposing faction creatures to attack you

entries.name: HATRED2_BITS_INT
entries.description: for opposing faction creatures to attack you

entries.name: HATRED3_BITS_INT
entries.description: for opposing faction creatures to attack you

entries.name: HEAR_LOCAL_SIGNALS_INT
entries.description: Boolean whether WCID is able to detect local signals.

entries.name: HEAR_LOCAL_SIGNALS_RADIUS_INT
entries.description: Radius a 290-1 item will detect signals

entries.name: CLEAVING_INT
entries.description: Cleave: X enemies in front arc
entries.notes: (usually 2, only Well Balanced Lugian Greataxe and Iasparailaun have  3)

entries.name: AUGMENTATION_SKILLED_MAGIC_INT
entries.notes: Master of the Five Fold Path

entries.name: IMBUED_EFFECT_2_INT
entries.description: Utilized to check for "Category A" weapon enhancements.

entries.name: IMBUED_EFFECT_3_INT
entries.description: Utilized to check for "Category B" weapon enhancements.

entries.name: IMBUED_EFFECT_4_INT
entries.description: Utilized to check for "Category C" weapon enhancements.

entries.name: IMBUED_EFFECT_5_INT
entries.description: Utilized to check for armor enhancements.

entries.name: ITEM_MAX_LEVEL_INT
entries.description: max level an item can earn xp to

entries.name: ITEM_XP_STYLE_INT
entries.description: 1 = each level cost the same xp, 2 = xp cost per level increases each level

entries.name: AETHERIA_BITFIELD_INT
entries.description: bitfield for number of aetheria slots unlocked 1, 3, 7 for 1-3 slots.

entries.name: HERITAGE_SPECIFIC_ARMOR_INT
entries.description: heritage enum for racial items, 13 for olthoi (salivatory goo)

entries.name: NETHER_RESIST_RATING_INT
entries.description: Damage Resistance Reduction amount based on void DOTs applied

entries.name: LUMINANCE_AWARD_INT
entries.description: amount of luminance xp  a creature awards on death

entries.name: LUM_AUG_DAMAGE_RATING_INT
entries.description: number of times earned (5x) or (10x for one of these)

entries.name: LUM_AUG_DAMAGE_REDUCTION_RATING_INT
entries.description: number of times earned (5x) or (10x for one of these)

entries.name: LUM_AUG_CRIT_DAMAGE_RATING_INT
entries.description: number of times earned (5x) or (10x for one of these)

entries.name: LUM_AUG_CRIT_REDUCTION_RATING_INT
entries.description: number of times earned (5x) or (10x for one of these)

entries.name: LUM_AUG_NO_DESTROY_CRAFT_INT
entries.description: A flag to prevent tinkers from destroying??

entries.name: USE_CREATES_CONTRACT_ID_INT
entries.description: upon using a contract,  add to contracts tab by id

entries.name: CLOAK_WEAVE_PROC_INT
entries.description: only used for the -200 proc cloaks

entries.name: WEAPON_TYPE_INT
entries.notes: Used for Weapon Mastery ie, Heavy Weapon >(Dagger)<

entries.name: MELEE_MASTERY_INT
entries.notes: 1 = unarmed; 2 = sword; 3 = axes; 4 = maces; 5 = spears; 6 = daggers; 7 = staves; 11 = Two-handed

entries.name: RANGED_MASTERY_INT
entries.notes: 8 = bow; 9 = crossbow; 10 = Thrown weapons; 12 = magical spells

entries.name: USE_REQUIRES_SKILL_LEVEL_INT
entries.notes: Player Summoning Skill minimum to Use Essence

entries.name: USE_REQUIRES_LEVEL_INT
entries.notes: Player Level minimum to Use Item

entries.name: GEAR_DAMAGE_INT
entries.description: total damage rating of equipped gear

entries.name: GEAR_DAMAGE_RESIST_INT
entries.description: total damage resist rating of equipped gear
entries.notes: "Ratings: Dam Resist x" to Armor or Summoning Pet

entries.name: GEAR_CRIT_INT
entries.description: total crit chance rating of equipped gear

entries.name: GEAR_CRIT_RESIST_INT
entries.description: total crit resist rating of equipped gear
entries.notes: "Ratings; Crit Resist x" on Summoning Pet

entries.name: GEAR_CRIT_DAMAGE_INT
entries.description: total crit damage rating of equipped gear
entries.notes: "Ratings; Crit Dam x" to Armor or Summoning Pet

entries.name: GEAR_CRIT_DAMAGE_RESIST_INT
entries.description: total crit damage resist rating of equipped gear
entries.notes: "Ratings: Crit Dam Resist x" to Armor or Summoning Pet

entries.name: GEAR_HEALING_BOOST_INT
entries.description: total heal boost rating of equipped gear

entries.name: GEAR_NETHER_RESIST_INT
entries.description: total nether damage resist rating of equipped gear

entries.name: GEAR_LIFE_RESIST_INT
entries.description: total life resist rating of equipped gear

entries.name: GEAR_MAX_HEALTH_INT
entries.description: total vitality rating of gear (and maybe health of summons?)

entries.name: HEALTH_ATTRIBUTE_2ND
entries.description: curent health (due to debuffs / vitae  etc)

entries.name: ITEM_TOTAL_XP_INT64
entries.description: total xp item an item can earn

entries.name: ITEM_BASE_XP_INT64
entries.description: amount of xp required per item level

entries.name: PORTAL_SUMMON_LOC_POSITION
entries.description: portal is summoned in specific location on event (usually boss killed)

entries.name: RELATIVE_DESTINATION_POSITION
entries.description: destination relative to the current position, only used on a single test portal

entries.name: TELEPORTED_CHARACTER_POSITION
entries.description: admin property for the command to return players to their last location?

entries.name: HERITAGE_GROUP_STRING
entries.description: Sho, Aluvian, Gharu'ndim, Aun, Viamontian, Empyrean, Hea, Haebrous

entries.name: TEMPLATE_STRING
entries.description: Like a title, but for npcs / creatures / objects
entries.notes: example: Barkeeper, Arcanum Agent, Mage, Citizen of Holtburg, Apprentice, Herbalist etc

entries.name: LOCK_CODE_STRING
entries.description: string on objects that match the KEY_CODE on key that unlocks

entries.name: KEY_CODE_STRING
entries.description: string on key that match the LOCK_CODE on object to be unlocked

entries.name: USE_STRING
entries.notes: "Use this item on a locked door or chest to unlock it." -- "Use the Academy Quartermaster's Key on this door to open it."

entries.name: SHORT_DESC_STRING
entries.notes: Short description does not show up in game.

entries.name: LONG_DESC_STRING
entries.notes: Long description shows up when players ID an item.

entries.name: ACTIVATION_TALK_STRING
entries.notes: "You suffer %i damage from the sewer's noxious fumes!" -- "Disturbing the rocks has alerted the guardians to your presence."

entries.name: USE_MESSAGE_STRING
entries.description: Messages sent when using an object (pk/npk altar, lifestone)
entries.notes: "You are enveloped in a feeling of warmth as you are brought back protection of Light."

entries.name: ACTIVATION_FAILURE_STRING
entries.description: Attempted to activate / use something still on timer
entries.notes: "The eye is silent, you already a tool of darkness, a Player Killer." -- "The fountain was used too recently!"

entries.name: TOWN_NAME_STRING
entries.description: Town Names, Outpost Names, Casino Names on objects

entries.name: CRAFTSMAN_NAME_STRING
entries.description: This item can only be wielded by X -- slayer imbues etc

entries.name: USE_PK_SERVER_ERROR_STRING
entries.description: message received when using pk/npk device on pk server
entries.notes: "The memorial sits silent..." -- "The altar simply remains silent."

entries.name: GENERATOR_EVENT_STRING
entries.notes: related quests: aerfalle, clutch of kings, mt lethe

entries.name: APPRAISAL_PORTAL_DESTINATION_STRING
entries.description: Displays portal destination string on portal ID panel
entries.notes: requires PORTAL_SHOW_DESTINATION_BOOL to be set to 1 to show

entries.name: DATE_OF_BIRTH_STRING
entries.description: character date of birth on ID panel

entries.name: USE_SENDS_SIGNAL_STRING
entries.description: sends signal string OnUse (similar to LocalSignal_EmoteType)
entries.notes: objects with HEAR_LOCAL_SIGNALS_INT and HEAR_LOCAL_SIGNALS_RADIUS react to this signal with ReceiveLocalSignal_EmoteCategory ?
